title: Login Issue
affected_users: A significant subset of users, exact number not specified.
reproduction_steps: Navigate to the login page on a browser or app used by affected users.
expected_behavior: Upon entering valid credentials and clicking 'Login', user should be authenticated successfully without any spinner appearing afterward, granting access to their account.
actual_behavior: Users see a spinning wheel upon login attempt with no further action or response from the system. No error messages are displayed.
priority_reasoning: Contains multiple issues, but given that authentication is critical for user access and revenue generation, this issue takes precedence over others not mentioned in the report.
